_note: Demo fixture for npm run wow. These are fictional signals used to illustrate how WorldLoops finds unfinished responsibilities across a typical day. No external systems are contacted. Nothing is sent or changed.

signals.text: Thanks for the workshop. Could you send over the proposal by Friday?
signals.summary: Follow-up request: proposal due by Friday

openLoop.title: Proposal follow-up
openLoop.whyItMatters: David asked for a proposal by Friday.
openLoop.suggestedNextStep: Prepare or draft the proposal follow-up.
openLoop.safety: WorldLoops did not send an email.

signals.text: LG Executive Workshop — Tuesday 10:00 AM. Bring final materials and workshop canvas.

openLoop.title: Workshop preparation
openLoop.whyItMatters: A workshop is scheduled and materials are required.
openLoop.safety: WorldLoops did not edit your calendar.

metadata.title: LG Executive Workshop
metadata.description: Bring final materials and workshop canvas.

signals.text: Can you review the pricing plan before tomorrow's meeting?
signals.summary: Review request: pricing plan needed before tomorrow's meeting

openLoop.title: Pricing plan review
openLoop.suggestedNextStep: Review the pricing plan or assign an owner.
openLoop.safety: WorldLoops did not post a reply.

signals.text: TODO: Add ROI assumptions before sending to the client.
signals.summary: Unfinished TODO in proposal document — ROI assumptions missing

signals.text: Ready for review: Add safety check before execution.
signals.summary: Pull request awaiting review — safety check change

openLoop.title: Approval needed before release

openLoop.safety: WorldLoops did not merge, approve, or change anything.

signals.text: Follow up with Sarah about next steps after the demo.
